key_facts: Özgür Özel was elected CHP chairman in November 2023, defeating Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu at an extraordinary congress.
CHP won the March 2024 local elections as the leading party, taking Istanbul and Ankara municipalities.
Mutlak butlan (absolute nullity) is a Turkish legal doctrine meaning a legal act is void from inception — invoked by CHP dissidents to challenge congress or delegate election validity.
Internal CHP factional tensions have centered on candidate selection, ideological direction, and rivalry between the Özel and İmamoğlu camps.
Dissident factions have sought to use mutlak butlan claims to force a new party congress or invalidate leadership decisions.
IMPORTANT: Web search tools were unavailable; June 2026 specifics could not be verified and require live source cross-validation.
